name: Permethrin (5% Cream)
description: A synthetic pyrethroid compound acting as a powerful neurotoxic acaricide. It disrupts nerve cell membranes of Sarcoptes scabiei mites, causing paralysis and death. Globally recognized as the first-line gold standard chemical treatment for scabies infestations.
preparation: Apply cream thoroughly from the neck down to the soles of the feet, paying special attention to interdigital webs, wrists, armpits, and groin. Wash off completely after 8 to 14 hours. Repeat application in 7 days to clear newly hatched eggs.
safetyAlert: Mild, transient burning or stinging may occur. Safe for pregnant and lactating women, and pediatric patients older than 2 months.
interactions: None documented. Avoid concurrent use with corticosteroids to prevent masking skin reactions or exacerbating irritation.
